title: Iqbal Verse #181 — Allama Iqbal Urdu Shayari
content:
کیوں اے جنابِ شیخ! سُنا آپ نے بھی کچھ
کہتے تھے کعبے والوں سے کل اہلِ دَیر کیا

— Translation —
O Shaikh! Have you heard something?
What the temple’s people’s say to the Ka`bah’s people!
meaning: "Iqbal Verse #181" by Allama Iqbal is a deep urdu poem consisting of 6 lines. This Urdu verse by Allama Iqbal showcases the rich tradition of South Asian poetry. The poet masterfully employs Urdu literary conventions to convey profound emotional depth. Beginning with "کیوں اے جنابِ شیخ! سُنا آپ نے بھی کچھ کہتے تھے کعبے والوں سے کل اہلِ دَیر کیا...", this piece explores themes of deep through vivid imagery and emotional resonance. The work invites contemplation on the deeper currents of life, love, and the human condition. Allama Iqbal's celebrated body of poetry continues to inspire readers across generations and cultures, and this particular work stands as a powerful example of their artistic vision.
